title: LES — Vortex Shedding, Rectangular Bluff Body
description: Large-eddy simulation resolving turbulent wake structures at Re=22,000. Mesh: ~4M cells, dynamic Smagorinsky SGS model.

title: FEA — Buckling of CFRP Cylindrical Shell
description: Linear perturbation buckling analysis with geometric imperfection seeding. Layup sensitivity study across [0/θ]₂s configurations.

title: CHT — PCB in Vented Enclosure
description: Steady-state conjugate heat transfer. Components modeled as volumetric heat sources; enclosure includes inlet/outlet vents.

title: Relay-Feedback PID Autotuning Simulation
description: Closed-loop Simulink model with relay element for ultimate gain identification. Parameter sweep across inertia loads.

title: Two-Way FSI — NACA Flexible Wing
description: Partitioned FSI coupling between RANS flow solver and FEM structural solver. ALE mesh deformation for fluid domain.
